work.name: BlakIA
highlights: Developing tailored AI-powered automation solutions for businesses.
Automating complex business processes including financial auditing, logistics optimization, and customer engagement.
Creating scalable and customizable AI infrastructures for real-time interactions and data-driven decision making.
Built end-to-end automation pipelines using AI for SMEs and startups.
Developed internal tools for sales, customer service, and operations using GPTs, n8n and custom APIs.
